hero.title: Reliable Medical & Visa Support for Foreign Patients
hero.subtitle: Ensuring a safe, fast healthcare journey and legal stay in Korea.

services.medicalDesc: We provide optimal hospital matching, appointment booking, and professional medical translation tailored to your symptoms.
services.visaDesc: From document preparation for medical visas (C-3-3, G-1-10) to extension of stay, we support your legal and safe residence.
